fields.panel1_caption: using AI to help write code
fields.panel2_caption: posting raw ChatGPT screenshots as your own reasoning
fields.panel3_caption: giving security staff with no coding background full autonomous AI control
fields.panel4_caption: concluding physics and mathematics are incorrect because ChatGPT said so

narrative_summary: The joke escalates through real examples from the HN thread — from reasonable AI use to galaxy-brained 'AI beat Newton' logic — capturing the 'AI psychosis' arc Hashimoto warned about.
rationale: Candidate 4 earns its specificity score by including the genuinely surprising and concrete detail about 'security staff with no coding background given full autonomous AI control' — a real HN-thread beat that none of the others use — which makes the escalation feel earned rather than generic. The punchline lands harder because the penultimate panel is so absurdly specific that 'physics is wrong' reads as the inevitable galaxy-brain conclusion rather than just a restatement.
story_title: "I believe there are entire companies right now under AI psychosis"
place: inside a Zoom waiting room for all eternity
